name: Chile Paste
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Small dried red chiles, such as Piquins
2 cups Dried crushed red NM chiles, seeds included
recipeInstructions:
Chile pastes are very popular throughout Southeast Asia and are used to add heat to a dish. The pastes can be added during cooking or can be used as a condiment or relish on the table. Vary the amount of garlic to suit individual tastes.
Combine all ingredients with 3/4 cup water in a blender and puree for about 1 minute, or until reaching a thick paste consistency.
Store in a glass container in the refrigerator; it will last up to three months.
